response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, or leadership scaling teams beyond 10 people — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven experience with event-driven systems, microservices, and real-time data (Dlang, streaming)
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops and talks
concerns: No clear evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
No mention of financial infrastructure (credit risk, working capital, trade decisioning) or compliance frameworks
